title: Ensure Test Stability
description: Unstable tests slow down development and can lead to bugs in production. This rule raises an issue when the annotation org.testng.annotations.Test is given a successPercentage argument with a value lower than 100.
recommendation: Fix the test to ensure it always passes.
impact: Impact on code quality and security due to unstable tests.

checks.message: Fix the test to ensure it always passes.
